bead.title: Stage 1.12: mark historical docs superseded (no body rewrite)
bead.description: Add a front-matter or top-of-file note to docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-04.md, docs/helix/06-iterate/alignment-reviews/AR-*.md files, any TP-002 related docs: 'Historical — describes the pre-2026-04-14 React stack. Current stack: see ADR-002 v2.' Do NOT rewrite the bodies. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #12.
bead.acceptance: (1) Each flagged historical doc has a clear 'Historical' note at top. (2) Bodies unchanged (git diff shows only the note added).
